name: Akinyemi Agbede
background: Nigerian-American mathematician and educator. Born May 5, 1964, in Lagos, Nigeria. Holds a mathematics degree from the University of Lagos. PhD in Mathematical Analysis from the University of Cambridge. Has contributed to STEM education in the United States. Previously ran for California governor in 2014 and 2018, and pursued a U.S. Senate seat. First Nigerian-American to seek the governorship of California.
statement: Empowering California's future visit my website at www.thenextgovernorofcalifornia2026.net.

positions.economy: Create job opportunities; support businesses; implement tax reforms to reduce financial burden on families
positions.housing: Expand affordable housing access; enhance support services for homeless individuals
positions.education: Evidence-driven, data-informed leadership; STEM education advocacy
positions.publicSafety: Strengthen community policing; invest in crime prevention programs; build trust in neighborhoods
positions.government: Evidence-driven leadership; fairness and opportunity; measurable outcomes

contact.address: 545 S. San Pedro Street, Los Angeles, CA 90013
